user.about: Model sheets, concept designs, sketches and tutorials from established and promising artists working in animation, movies, games, illustration and comics.

board.name: Character Design Challenge
board.description: The “Character Design Challenge” is a community created by Character Design References™ (CDR). The artworks posted on this board are the monthly winners of the challenge. If you want to see more of the works submitted every day by the artists of our community, or if you want to join us, please visit our group on Facebook: www.facebook.com/groups/CharacterDesignChallenge
